text:
- Use PYTHON_SITELIBDIR in pkg-plist, for other versions of python
- Change DOCSDIR, maybe same with it's dirname is better
- Remove NOPORTDOCS stuff, it's already in bsd.port.mk
- Add more backup sites in MASTER_SITES

Port maintainer (bsam@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
